## Pull Request Description

### What does this PR do?
<!-- Provide a clear description of what changes you're making -->

### Type of Change
- [ ] New command documentation
- [ ] Bug fix (typo, error, incorrect information)
- [ ] Enhancement (improving existing documentation)
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)
- [ ] Style/formatting changes
- [ ] Configuration changes

### Related Issue
<!-- If this PR addresses an issue, link it here -->
Fixes #(issue number)

---

## Checklist

### Content Quality
- [ ] I have followed the [content template](../CONTRIBUTING.md#content-template)
- [ ] All code examples have been tested and work correctly
- [ ] Grammar and spelling have been checked
- [ ] Technical accuracy has been verified

### Code/Formatting
- [ ] Markdown formatting is correct
- [ ] Code blocks use proper syntax highlighting (```bash)
- [ ] All links work correctly
- [ ] Images (if any) are properly linked and displayed

### Testing
- [ ] Local development server runs without errors (`npm run docs:dev`)
- [ ] Production build succeeds (`npm run docs:build`)
- [ ] Changes preview correctly in browser

### Documentation
- [ ] Commit messages follow the format (Add:/Fix:/Update:)
- [ ] PR description clearly explains the changes
- [ ] Related commands/sections are cross-linked

---
